tool.name: Build genomes.txt
tool.description: assemble a UCSC assembly-hub genomes.txt from a per-assembly metadata table

param.label: Per-assembly metadata table
param.help: TSV with a header row. Required columns: accession, defaultPos (chrom:start-end), organism, scientificName, description. Optional columns override the derived paths: twoBitPath, trackDb, groups, htmlPath.

tool.help:
**Build genomes.txt**
Assembles the global ``genomes.txt`` for a [UCSC assembly hub](https://genome.ucsc.edu/goldenPath/help/hgTrackHubHelp.html#Assembly) from a per-assembly metadata table. ``genomes.txt`` lists every assembly in the hub; each assembly is one stanza of ``key value`` lines, stanzas separated by a blank line.
-----
**Input**
A TSV metadata table with a header row, one row per assembly.
*Required columns*
- ``accession`` — assembly accession, used as the genome id and the per-assembly directory name. - ``defaultPos`` — default browser position, formatted ``chrom:start-end`` (e.g. ``LT635625.2:1264700-1277700``). - ``organism`` — organism token (underscored, e.g. ``Plasmodium_vivax``). - ``scientificName`` — scientific name (e.g. ``Plasmodium vivax``). - ``description`` — human-readable assembly description.
*Optional columns* (each defaults to a path derived from the accession)
- ``twoBitPath`` (default ``<accession>/<accession>.2bit``) - ``trackDb`` (default ``<accession>/trackDb.txt``) - ``groups`` (default ``<accession>/groups.txt``) - ``htmlPath`` (default ``<accession>/description.html``)
**Output**
A ``genomes.txt`` file. Each assembly stanza is emitted as:
``` genome <accession> trackDb <accession>/trackDb.txt groups <accession>/groups.txt description <description> twoBitPath <accession>/<accession>.2bit organism <organism> defaultPos <chrom>:<start>-<end> scientificName <scientific name> htmlPath <accession>/description.html ```
